description_long: This backpack features a main body made of a textured, dark gray fabric with a subtle woven pattern, giving it a modern and urban appearance. Two wide, brown faux-leather straps with brass buckles run vertically down the front, providing both a decorative and functional element. The sides and bottom corners are reinforced with smooth, black material, likely synthetic leather or rubber, for added durability and structure. The back of the backpack is equipped with two broad, black shoulder straps, designed for comfortable carrying. The overall shape is rounded and slightly tapered towards the top, with a compact and streamlined silhouette. No visible logos, zippers, or external pockets are present, emphasizing a minimalist and clean design.
description: A modern, dark gray fabric backpack with brown faux-leather front straps, black reinforced corners, and broad black shoulder straps. The design is minimalist, with no visible logos, zippers, or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing two brown faux-leather straps with brass buckles running vertically over the dark gray fabric body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the backpack's rounded profile, black reinforced corner, and the edge of the brown strap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying two wide, black shoulder straps and the full width of the dark gray fabric body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rounded shape, black corner reinforcement, and strap edge.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, brown faux-leather front straps with brass buckles; two broad, black adjustable shoulder straps on the back; no visible chest or waist straps.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment; no visible external or internal pockets.
